meaning: n.签,抽签,一堆,许多,命运,一块地,份额vt.划分vi.抽签,抓阄
examples: I listened to a lot of people handing out a lot of advice.
Gosh, there's a lot of noise.
I'm feeling a whole lot better.
Mr Paes promised to "work hard and treat the citizens with a lot of respect".
My own take on it is that the music comes from a lot of different places.
